description_long: This office building complex consists of four interconnected structures, each with a distinct facade and roof design. The exteriors feature a combination of glass windows, concrete or stone cladding, and colored accents in blue, green, and gray. The buildings vary in height and width, with the tallest section on the left and the widest section in the center. The roofs include both flat and slightly sloped surfaces, some with visible skylights or glass panels. The ground level is set on a tiled or paved base, suggesting a sidewalk or plaza area. The window arrangements are highly regular, with horizontal bands and vertical columns creating a modern, geometric appearance.
description: A modern office building complex with four interconnected structures, featuring glass windows, colored accents, and flat or glass-paneled roofs. The facade is geometric and contemporary, with regular window patterns and a paved base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facades of all four buildings, highlighting their distinct heights, colored accents, and large, regular window arrays.
description_view_1: The right-side view emphasizes the depth of the complex and the green-accented building with its glass-paneled roof.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back facades, with less window detail and more solid wall sections, as well as the blue-accented building's side.
description_view_3: The left-side view focuses on the blue-accented tower and the glass roof sections, showing the building's layered structure.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows, evenly spaced in vertical columns, with some sections featuring grouped or grid-like arrangements.
